pi_items.source: French accounting standard terminology - TVA is the official acronym for Taxe sur la Valeur Ajoutée (Value Added Tax in France). Verified through multiple French VAT compliance sources.

France's official reduced VAT rate for food products and agricultural inputs. Verified through Avalara, Baker McKenzie, Wise, and Stripe VAT compliance documentation. 5.5% is the standard reduced rate for unprepared food, gas, electricity, and agricultural products in France.

ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for France. Task describes 'TVA Réduite Alimentaire' (Reduced VAT for Food), which is the official French classification for this VAT rate. Verified through French accounting standards.

privileged_info_summary: This task uses real data from Ekylibre, a legitimate open-source Farm Management Information System. The metadata claims refer to authentic French VAT terminology and rates: TVA (Taxe sur la Valeur Ajoutée) is the official French term for VAT; 5.5% is France's official reduced VAT rate for food products and agricultural inputs, published by French tax authorities; 'fr' is the correct ISO country code for France. The task references the public demo instance at demo.ekylibre.farm and uses real French accounting standards (e.g., account 445 for VAT-related accounts in the chart of accounts). All three metadata claims represent accurate, real-world information about French taxation.
